trigger: 沈家提亲及女儿回娘家养胎期间，面对门第差距、聘礼以及女儿的固执决定感到担忧与无奈。

appearance_delta.face: 眉头微蹙，眼神中充满对女儿未来的担忧与不解，面容略显疲惫与愁苦
appearance_delta.body: 姿态微微放松但略带沉重感，显出老父亲的心理压力
appearance_delta.hair: 半白发髻，梳理得一丝不苟
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 看着女儿或聘礼时常常叹气，满面愁容

costume_override.outfit: 深褐色的居家宽袍，质地柔软舒适

visual_reference: 1man, middle-aged ancient chinese official, kind face, wrinkles around eyes, frowning, worried expression, sighing, wearing dark brown loose traditional robes, fatherly aura, indoor lighting, masterpiece, high quality
